candidate: CASQUE-RECEIVER: explicit low-pass residual-stream branch per layer (alongside attention) tuned to long-range sequence positional content, reducing attention-sink reliance.

per_result_judgments.title: Cassowary Low-Frequency Vocalizations
per_result_judgments.rationale: Source-domain biology only; no LLM mechanism overlap.

per_result_judgments.title: Streaming LLM Attention Sinks (ICLR 2024)
per_result_judgments.rationale: Concerns attention sinks themselves; does not propose a dedicated low-pass residual-stream branch.

per_result_judgments.title: Retentive Network (RetNet 2023)
per_result_judgments.rationale: RetNet replaces attention with retention; not a parallel low-pass branch.

per_result_judgments.title: Residual Matrix Transformers (RMT, 2025)
per_result_judgments.rationale: Scales residual stream; sem=0.70 and func=0.72 both at/above threshold.

per_result_judgments.title: Blockwise Parallel Transformer (BPT)
per_result_judgments.rationale: Blockwise compute optimization, not a low-pass branch.

per_result_judgments.title: Attention Sinks & Compression Valleys (OpenReview)
per_result_judgments.rationale: Sem=0.72 above threshold; addresses sinks from massive activations — adjacent to attention-sink-reduction motivation.

per_result_judgments.title: Dedicated Low-Pass Residual Stream Branch for Long-Range Propagation (2026/03)
per_result_judgments.rationale: Direct twin: explicit dedicated low-pass residual-stream branch per layer for long-range propagation.

per_result_judgments.title: Casque-Inspired Resonant Long-Range Receiver Branch in Transformer (2025/11)
per_result_judgments.rationale: Exact casque-inspired tunable resonant low-pass residual-stream branch — same mechanism and bio-inspiration as CASQUE-RECEIVER.

summary: Two direct twins exist at ranks 7 and 8 — including a casque-inspired resonant low-pass residual-stream branch paper that matches both the bio-inspiration and the LLM mechanism. Rank 4 (RMT) and rank 6 (attention sinks theory) provide additional supporting overlap. The candidate's core proposal (dedicated low-pass residual-stream branch per layer for long-range info, reducing attention-sink reliance) is already published.
